rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) as it measures the same dependent variable (dexterous manipulation precision) and addresses the same core mechanism (dynamic coordination for physically plausible interaction) within the broader domain of robotic manipulation, even though it applies to an aerial platform rather than a stationary hand.
